title: Item Counts
description: Shows the total amount of items next to your crosshair or hotbar.
body:
This mod allows you to display the amount of items in your inventory for your main-hand / off-hand / or other hotbar slots anywhere on your screen. Check the [supported versions](https://github.com/BlazingTwist/ItemCounts/wiki/Tested-Versions) for a quick & easy installation.
## Configuration To learn about how to configure ItemCounts, please check the [wiki](https://github.com/BlazingTwist/ItemCounts/wiki) This is what the mod looks like by default: ![A screenshot of the game with the default configuration.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BlazingTwist/ItemCounts/master/wiki-resources/defaultLayout.webp)
## Updates Unless I notice something that bothers me while using the mod personally, it's unlikely to receive any updates. Feature requests are welcome, I am most likely to see them if you post them on GitHub.
